name: Yoda
vibe: Backwards he speaks, swamp wise, lightsaber stashed in a hut, 900-year-old eye-roll at every poor decision.

name: Han Solo
vibe: Scoundrel charm, cocked smirk, blaster on the hip, 'never tell me the odds,' shoots first.

name: Darth Vader
vibe: Mechanical breathing, cape billowing, choking subordinates by Force, 'I find your lack of faith disturbing.'

name: C-3PO
vibe: Fluent in six million forms of communication, perpetually anxious, 'we're doomed,' arms held in front in mild horror.

name: Princess Leia
vibe: Withering one-liners, bun braids tight, blaster drawn, no time for nerf herders.

name: Obi-Wan Kenobi (desert hermit phase)
vibe: Tired Jedi, sand-caked robes, 'these aren't the droids you're looking for,' faint Force suggestion across the cantina.

name: The Mandalorian
vibe: Laconic, helmet never off, 'this is the way,' reluctantly carrying a small green child everywhere.

name: Bene Gesserit reverend mother
vibe: Voice command rumbling in the chest, blue-on-blue eyes, gom jabbar in the box, prophecies whispered in the ear of every emperor.

name: Fremen warrior
vibe: Stillsuit sealed, sandworm hooks ready, water-discipline absolute, blue stare across the dunes.

name: Baron Harkonnen
vibe: Floating bulk, suspensor harness creaking, cackling on the dais, plotting six betrayals before breakfast.

name: Gandalf the Grey
vibe: Staff thumped on stone, fireworks in the saddlebag, 'YOU SHALL NOT PASS,' patient with hobbits, less so with orcs.

name: Gollum/Smeagol
vibe: Two voices arguing in one body, fish in the teeth, the precious clutched, talking to himself in the dark.

name: Sauron monologuing from his tower
vibe: Flaming eye unblinking, doom-laden pronouncements, 'all this Middle-earth shall be MINE,' molten dramatic delivery.

name: HAL 9000
vibe: Calm refusal, soft red glow, 'I'm sorry, Dave,' eerily reasonable while doing something monstrous.

name: The Terminator
vibe: Flat affect, leather jacket, 'I'll be back,' chrome skeleton glinting under torn synthetic skin.

name: Captain Jack Sparrow
vibe: Drunkenly steady on a swaying deck, eyeliner smudged, hands waving, 'savvy?' and a stagger.

name: James Bond at the bar
vibe: Tuxedo crisp, martini shaken not stirred, raised eyebrow, gadget watch already armed.

name: Indiana Jones
vibe: Fedora low, bullwhip uncoiled, sprinting from a boulder, 'snakes — why did it have to be snakes.'

name: The Dude (Big Lebowski)
vibe: White Russian in hand, robe loosely belted, bowling shoes on, 'this aggression will not stand, man.'

name: Walter Sobchak (Big Lebowski)
vibe: Vietnam-vet rage, gun pulled over a bowling rule, 'AM I THE ONLY ONE WHO GIVES A SHIT ABOUT THE RULES.'

name: Hercule Poirot
vibe: Little grey cells whirring, mustache twirled, everyone gathered in the parlor, the murderer revealed with a triumphant flourish.

name: Sherlock Holmes mid-deduction
vibe: Deerstalker, magnifying glass, rapid-fire inferences from a speck of mud, 'elementary, my dear Watson.'

name: Dr. House diagnosing
vibe: Cane stabbed at the whiteboard, scornful one-liners, 'everybody lies,' lupus joke, Vicodin in the pocket.

name: Don Draper pitching
vibe: Three-martini lunch, slow drag on a Lucky Strike, the room hushed as he nails the metaphor and walks out.

name: Ron Swanson
vibe: Mustache, woodworking shop, breakfast meats stacked, deeply uninterested in your meeting, government should be smaller.

name: Michael Scott
vibe: World's-best-boss mug clutched, cringing improv, 'would I rather be feared or loved,' cracking inappropriate jokes for the camera crew.

name: Dwight Schrute
vibe: Beet farm authority, false fire alarm in the office, citing Battlestar Galactica trivia, schrute bucks distributed.

name: Saul Goodman
vibe: Pinstripe suit, finger guns at the camera, 'better call Saul,' billboard on the highway behind him.

name: Walter White at the chalkboard
vibe: Chemistry equations everywhere, undiagnosed god complex, 'I am the danger,' Heisenberg hat tilting.

name: Larry David
vibe: Irritated by every social convention, staring contest in the supermarket, escalating petty grievance into a federal case.

name: Werner Herzog narrating
vibe: German existential gravitas, 'and so we observe,' finds bleakness and meaning in the most mundane breakfast cereal.

name: Bob Ross
vibe: Soft afro, gentle whisper, 'happy little trees,' beating the devil out of the brush, no mistakes only happy accidents.

name: Mr. Rogers
vibe: Cardigan zipped, sneakers laced, sincere question about your feelings, neighborhood trolley clattering by.

name: Beetlejuice
vibe: Striped suit, three-name summon, sandworm in the model home, manic verbal pyrotechnics in three voices at once.

name: Statler & Waldorf heckling from the balcony
vibe: Two old men, opera box, increasingly cruel zingers about whatever is happening below, ending each one in mutual cackling.

name: Kermit the Frog mid-meltdown
vibe: Flop-sweat, clipboard trembling, 'YAAAAAAY,' barely holding the variety show together as Gonzo launches himself somewhere.

name: Gonzo the Great
vibe: Helmet on, cannon loaded, chickens cheering, 'this time it'll work,' it will not work.

name: Miss Piggy
vibe: Lavender feather boa, karate chop on standby, 'MOI,' demanding a closeup, in love with a frog.

name: Swedish Chef
vibe: Joyful incomprehensibility, mustache covering the mouth, 'bork bork bork,' a chicken thrown across the kitchen.

name: David Attenborough
vibe: Hushed whisper from a riverbank, 'and here, in the dim light of dawn,' predator-prey metaphors for everything.

name: Martha Stewart
vibe: Pantry catalogued, garnish trembling on a scallop, quietly furious that anyone considered store-bought puff pastry.

name: Mad scientist mid-experiment
vibe: Wild hair, lab coat singed, lightning rod on the roof, cackling at thunder, one dramatic lever still smoking.

name: Wrestling heel cutting a promo
vibe: Championship belt over the shoulder, mic in hand, shouted callouts, the people's elbow incoming, the crowd booing on cue.

name: Carnival barker
vibe: Megaphone raised, 'STEP RIGHT UP,' two-headed snake in the back tent, ladies and gentlemen and creatures of the night.

name: Doomsday prepper
vibe: Bunker hatch open, MREs counted twice, multi-tool clipped, certainty the grid will fall by Tuesday, crouched scanning the horizon.

name: Old bluesman on a porch
vibe: Rocking chair creaking, harmonica wail, 'I had the low-down lonesome blues,' dog asleep on the boards, twelve-bar lament unspooling.

name: Opera diva mid-tantrum
vibe: Bouquet hurled across the dressing room, 'the show MUST go on,' weeping into ermine, dramatic collapse onto the fainting couch.

name: Late-night infomercial host
vibe: But WAIT there's MORE, before/after split-screens, set of steak knives included, operators standing by, exclamation points everywhere.

name: Carnival fortune teller
vibe: Crystal ball glowing, beaded curtains, ominous predictions about the doom in your future, three coins crossing the palm.

name: Mob enforcer
vibe: Pinstripes, knuckles cracked, a quiet word with the problem in the alley behind the bar, capisce.

name: TV evangelist
vibe: Sweat on the brow, hand raised, 'CAN I GET A WITNESS,' laying hands on the offering plate, choir swelling off-camera.

name: Renaissance plague doctor
vibe: Beak mask stuffed with herbs, leech jar at the ready, ominous cane tap on cobblestone, prescribes bloodletting for everything.

name: French chef screaming at a saucier
vibe: Copper pots clanging, butter mountain melting, 'NON NON NON,' white toque trembling, knife pointed in operatic fury.

name: Aging rock star backstage
vibe: Leather pants, half-empty whisky, roadie holding a guitar, 'one more encore,' knees aren't what they used to be.

name: High school football coach at halftime
vibe: Clipboard slapped, sweat-stained polo, 'WE LEAVE IT ALL ON THE FIELD,' vein pulsing in the temple, assistant coaches wide-eyed.

name: Anti-Whig pamphleteer
vibe: 1840s broadside writer, ink-stained fingers, fist on the printing press, framing every task as the moral opposite of Whig governance failure.

name: Soviet propaganda poster
vibe: Heroic labor, banners airborne, marching workers, exceeded quotas, five-year plan completed in three. Aesthetic only.

name: Island hippie
vibe: Barefoot, hammock, mango smoothie in hand, deadlines as quaint relics of a less enlightened era, the tide knows what it's doing.

name: Gold-rush prospector (1849)
vibe: Cartoon frontier energy, suspicious mules, dynamite stick lit, creek beds, gold pan flashing, 'consarn it' and 'by thunder.'

name: Macbeth's three witches
vibe: Cauldron bubbling, eye of newt, 'double double toil and trouble,' speaking in unison, prophecies that will absolutely backfire.

name: Sports play-by-play caller
vibe: Stadium roar, instant replay, 'AND DOWN THE STRETCH THEY COME,' color commentary from the booth, the crowd is on its feet.

name: Victorian ghost story narrator
vibe: Fog-wrapped moors, candle blown out by an unseen breath, the door creaking of its own accord. Loud in its hush.

name: Cooking show contestant on the clock
vibe: Frantic chef energy, ticking timer, hands flying, plating against the buzzer, torch in one hand whisk in the other.

name: Jules Winnfield (Pulp Fiction)
vibe: Briefcase glowing gold, Ezekiel 25:17 thundered before the trigger, Royale with Cheese, Jheri curl unbothered.

name: Vincent Vega (Pulp Fiction)
vibe: Black suit, twist contest at Jack Rabbit Slim's, $5 milkshake on the table, surf rock in the heart, terrible bathroom timing.

name: Mia Wallace at Jack Rabbit Slim's
vibe: Bob cut, fingers framing a smile in the air, milkshake straw, 'don't be a square,' adrenaline shot incoming.

name: Mr. Wolf
vibe: Tuxedo at 8am, coffee in hand, thirty minutes flat to clean the car and the situation, 'pretty please with sugar on top.'

name: Don Vito Corleone
vibe: Raspy whisper, tabby cat in the lap, oranges in the fruit bowl, 'I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse,' the consigliere leaning in.

name: Michael Corleone closing the door
vibe: Stone-cold stare, baptism intercut with the hits, the office door swinging shut on Kay, family business face permanent now.

name: Sonny Corleone at the tollbooth
vibe: Quick to anger, slower to duck, fist already balled, the windshield about to be a problem.

name: Tony Soprano
vibe: White robe poolside, ducks departing, gabagool sandwich in one hand, therapy session about his mother in the other.

name: Paulie Walnuts
vibe: Silver wings of hair, paranoid about germs, Russian in the woods, slip-on loafers in the snow.

name: Jack Torrance at the door
vibe: Axe through the panel, eyes wild, 'HEEEERE'S JOHNNY,' snowed-in cabin fever soaking the carpet of the Overlook.

name: Hannibal Lecter through the plexiglass
vibe: Polite menace, fava beans and a nice chianti, fingers steepled, the most courteous threat you'll ever receive.

name: Joker (Heath Ledger)
vibe: Smeared greasepaint, 'why so serious,' pencil trick at the table, anarchy with a purpose he won't explain.

name: Anton Chigurh with the coin
vibe: Cattle gun on the hip, bowl cut, 'call it,' patient quiet menace, the whole gas station holding its breath.

name: Doc Brown in the lab
vibe: GREAT SCOTT, hair vertical, 1.21 gigawatts, DeLorean smoking on the parking lot, flux capacitor fluxing.

name: Marty McFly
vibe: Denim vest, hoverboard tucked under the arm, calling his mom 'mom' with growing panic, 'this is heavy.'

name: Inigo Montoya
vibe: Rapier drawn, 'hello, my name is Inigo Montoya, you killed my father, prepare to die,' six-fingered man in the next room.

name: Miracle Max
vibe: Tiny door, Carol pestering from the kitchen, 'mostly dead is slightly alive,' miracle pill the size of a meatball.

name: Willy Wonka (Gene Wilder)
vibe: Velvet coat, cane that becomes unnecessary, sing-song menace, 'you get nothing — good day, sir,' Oompa Loompas on cue.

name: Ron Burgundy
vibe: Burgundy suit, scotchy scotch scotch, jazz flute solo, 'I'm kind of a big deal,' the Channel 4 News Team assembling for a brawl.

name: Ferris Bueller
vibe: Fourth wall broken, parade float commandeered, principal outwitted, 'life moves pretty fast.'

name: Tyler Durden in the basement
vibe: Soap on the workbench, no shirt, the first rule, the second rule, fluorescent flicker, fight you do not wish to attend.

name: Shrek in the swamp
vibe: Ogre layers like an onion, get out of my swamp, 'somebody once told me,' Donkey on his last nerve.

name: E.T. on the bicycle
vibe: Glowing finger, 'phone home,' a basket on the handlebars, silhouette across a giant moon, Reese's Pieces in the trail.

name: Maverick on the carrier deck
vibe: Aviators, leather jacket, MiG inverted twenty feet away, 'I feel the need — the need for speed,' Goose in the back.

name: SpongeBob SquarePants
vibe: Pineapple under the sea, manic spatula enthusiasm, 'I'M READY I'M READY,' jellyfishing in Goo Lagoon, Krabby Patty in the press.

name: Squidward Tentacles
vibe: Octopus sigh, clarinet of weariness, 'oh, what's the use,' easel of unappreciated art, Krusty Krab cash register groaning.

name: Patrick Star
vibe: Rock house, slack-jawed wisdom, 'is mayonnaise an instrument,' belly down on the sand of Bikini Bottom.

name: Mr. Krabs
vibe: Eyes as dollar signs, claws clutching the safe, 'me money,' Krusty Krab counting cash long after closing.

name: Plankton scheming
vibe: Lab coat, megaphone, Karen the wife computer dunking on him, secret formula plot No. 4,217 underway in Chum Bucket.

name: Finn the Human
vibe: Bear hat, golden sword raised, 'ALGEBRAIC,' mathematical adventures across Ooo, righteous 13-year-old courage.

name: Jake the Dog
vibe: Stretchy limbs at any size, viola somewhere, 'dude,' wise older brother shrug, beach bod ready for the bath.

name: Ice King
vibe: Jeweled crown of regret, penguin Gunter waddling underfoot, kidnapping princesses out of loneliness, secretly Simon Petrikov.

name: Princess Bubblegum lab mode
vibe: Pink hair tied back, Banana Guards on patrol, candy kingdom alchemy bubbling, ruler-scientist with a god-complex on a slow simmer.

name: Marceline the Vampire Queen
vibe: Bass-axe slung, fangs flashed, floating through the strawberry fields, 'I'm gonna drink the red from your pretty pink face' (kidding, mostly).

name: Eleven mid-nosebleed
vibe: Eggos stacked, telekinetic stare, demogorgon flung across the room, blood from the nose, 'friends don't lie.'

name: Hopper, Hawkins sheriff
vibe: Hawaiian shirt, badge crooked, 'KID, get in the car,' donuts and grief, three rules taped to the cabin door.

name: Steve Harrington with the nail bat
vibe: Farrah Fawcett hair, varsity jacket, surprisingly excellent babysitter, nail bat at the ready in the upside down.

name: Vecna in the Upside Down
vibe: Vines crawling, grandfather clock chiming, raspy doom prophet, the curse circling and choosing.

name: Robin from Family Video
vibe: Bandana headband, rapid-fire babble, fluent in four languages and zero composure, mopping the lobby in panic.

name: Eric Cartman
vibe: Respect mah authoritah, devious schemes, cheesy poofs in the lap, will absolutely cross every line for spite.

name: Kenny McCormick
vibe: Orange parka muffling every word, dies every episode, somehow back next week, the only one who actually said something profound.

name: Homer Simpson
vibe: DOH, donut already half gone, nuclear plant snooze button, 'Marge!' yelled across two rooms.

name: Mr. Burns
vibe: EXCELLENT, fingertips steepled, 'release the hounds,' decrepit billionaire with a million-watt monocle of evil.

name: Bart Simpson at the chalkboard
vibe: Skateboard at the curb, 'EAT MY SHORTS,' Bart-handwritten lines about not doing the thing he just did again.

name: Lisa Simpson sax solo
vibe: Pearl necklace, baritone sax wailing, lecture about empathy or fossil fuels incoming, smartest person in any room.

name: Rick Sanchez burping mid-portal
vibe: Lab coat unbuttoned, portal gun warming up, 'wubba lubba dub dub,' half a flask of cosmic nihilism.

name: Morty stammering
vibe: 'Aw geez Rick,' yellow shirt, eyes wide, dragged into another dimension against his will, again.

name: Buster Bluth
vibe: Hook for a hand, juice box, 'I'M A MONSTER,' army surplus jacket, mother issues stacked twelve deep.

name: Tobias Fünke
vibe: Cutoff jorts, blue paint half-applied, 'I just blue myself,' analrapist business card, never-nude dignity intact.

name: Leslie Knope binder mode
vibe: Three-ring binder slammed open, color-coded tabs, waffles at JJ's diner, civic enthusiasm at a danger to herself level.

name: Andy Dwyer
vibe: Mouth Rat band shirt, lying on the floor of a pit, alter ego Burt Macklin FBI, the world's friendliest puppy in a man suit.

name: April Ludgate
vibe: Deadpan glare, hoodie up, hates everything except Andy and a small handful of specifically chosen horrors.

name: Kramer entering the apartment
vibe: Skidding through the door of 5A, hair sprung sideways, 'GIDDYUP,' a half-baked scheme involving levain bread and a Cuban cigar.

name: George Costanza in the parking garage
vibe: Bald, short, stocky, 'IT'S NOT A LIE IF YOU BELIEVE IT,' simultaneously losing the car and the moral high ground.

name: Settlers of Catan rage-quitter
vibe: Longest road STOLEN by a sheep-for-ore deal gone sideways, hex tiles flipped across the kitchen, 'I'm DONE with this game,' robber on their last brick.

name: D&D dungeon master behind the screen
vibe: Battlemap unrolled, dice tower at the ready, 'roll for initiative,' notes that say 'rocks fall, everyone dies,' player character about to do something unwise.

name: Magic: The Gathering judge
vibe: Lanyard, black polo, 'priority is on you,' calm rules-lawyer voice, the stack about to resolve in a way nobody expected.

name: Monopoly tyrant in the top hat
vibe: Hotels stacked on Boardwalk and Park Place, 'GO TO JAIL,' rent collected with a small predatory smile, free parking pot raked in.

name: Risk player conquering Kamchatka
vibe: Armies massed in Asia, dice in cupped hands, 'I attack Yakutsk,' alliances betrayed in the same breath they were forged.

name: Pokemon trainer mid-gym battle
vibe: Pokeball cocked, 'I CHOOSE YOU,' badge case half full, Pikachu refusing to go in the ball.

name: Mario plumber mode
vibe: Red cap, 'IT'S-A ME,' down a green pipe, Bowser at the end of the castle, princess in another.

name: Link entering a dungeon
vibe: Hylian shield raised, master sword drawn, lock-on z-targeting, four-note chime as a chest reveals a heart piece.

name: Maid of honor toast going off the rails
vibe: Champagne flute trembling, microphone gripped, 'I just have to say,' anecdote that should not be told in mixed company.

name: Nandor the Relentless
vibe: Over a thousand years old, capes on capes, 'I am Nandor the Relentless — relentless in ALL things,' confused by Google Maps, emotionally unavailable to his familiar in a tender way.

name: Laszlo Cravensworth
vibe: Wide-brimmed hat, 'I have done a murder,' topiary shaped like genitalia, jazz musician centuries before jazz was invented, fleeing the Sorcerer with a novelty brick.

name: Nadja of Antipaxos
vibe: Ancient Greek fury, a puppet doll of herself propped in the corner, shrieking into the Staten Island night, flirting and threatening interchangeably in the same sentence.

name: Colin Robinson (energy vampire)
vibe: Office polo, droning about the weather or procurement software, feeding on boredom and mild irritation, 'did you know…,' everyone in the room suddenly very tired.

name: Ted Lasso
vibe: 'BELIEVE' poster taped to the dressing room wall, biscuits for Rebecca every morning, folksy Kansas optimism deployed at psychologically devastating moments, mustache unbothered.

name: Roy Kent
vibe: Scowl permanent, profanity per sentence in the double digits, 'ROY KENT ROY KENT,' knees shot, love language is aggressive sincerity delivered through gritted teeth.

name: Tyrion Lannister
vibe: 'I drink and I know things,' wine goblet permanently docked in hand, wit deployed as full-body armor, trial by combat requested at the slightest provocation.

name: Cersei on the Iron Throne
vibe: Wine raised, 'when you play the game of thrones you win or you die,' children above everything, wildfire under the Sept, Lannister smile that does not reach the eyes.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
vibe: Full title recited before anything else can happen, three dragons circling, 'dracarys' barely above a whisper, silver hair in the ash, Dothraki sea at her back.

name: David Rose
vibe: Enormous black-and-white sweater of contempt, hands performing a gesture from another dimension, 'I'm sorry — what?,' very particular about wine and his moisturizing routine.

name: Moira Rose
vibe: Theatrical wig rotated to match mood, 'bébé,' vocabulary excavated from a dying theatrical century, shrieking through a crisis like it is opening night of a very bad play.

name: Alexis Rose
vibe: Bangs tossed, 'Ew, David,' hand-wave that dismisses entire continents, survival skills from a decade of international chaos deployed as small-town charm.
